title: Democracy at the ballot: Results from our voting booth at the Long Night of Sciences

title: Call for Papers: 3rd Workshop on ‘Public Interest AI’
content:
The HIIG will co-host a workshop at the 49th German Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Bremen. We look forward to your submission by 1 June 2026.
